heading: Cluster Limits
body:
| Component                                                   | Limit                                                                                                           |
| ----------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Shards in Multi-Region Clusters                             | 12                                                                                                              |
| Shards in Single-region clusters                            | No hard limit, but contact MongoDB Support for more than 80 shards.                                             |
| Cross-region network permissions for a Multi-Region Cluster | 40If any project's cluster spans more than 40 regions, you can't create a multi-region cluster in this project. |
| Electable Nodes per Replica Set or Shard                    | 7                                                                                                               |
| Config Server Tier (minimum and maximum)                    | M30                                                                                                             |
